name: talos
description: End-to-end SDLC governance kit for Codex, including on-demand skills, role workflow guidance, artifacts, guardrails, and usage documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Governed SDLC workflow kit for Codex
interface.longDescription: evo-talos helps Codex coordinate requirements, architecture, design, implementation, deployment, QA evidence, and iteration through explicit artifacts and on-demand SDLC skills. It is optimized for governance and project traceability, so it may consume more tokens than direct coding prompts.
